name: fenek-portfolio-companion
description: Read-only aggregator of your portfolio data across EU-available wallets, exchanges and brokers (Trading 212, Bybit, Solana/TON). Data collection only — no recommendations.
long_description: An unofficial, open-source MCP server that aggregates your portfolio data across wallets, exchanges and brokers available in Europe — Trading 212, Bybit, and Solana/TON wallets — and exposes it read-only to Claude for analysis. Ask about positions, pies, dividends, balances, concentration, and overlaps in plain language. Strictly data collection plus neutral metrics on your own data; it never recommends trades. No telemetry. API keys are stored in your OS keychain. Not affiliated with any broker. Not financial advice.

T212_API_KEY.title: Trading 212 API Key
T212_API_KEY.description: Generate in Trading 212 app: Settings → API (Beta). Use READ-ONLY permissions only.

T212_API_SECRET.title: Trading 212 API Secret
T212_API_SECRET.description: Shown once on key generation. Store this carefully.

ENVIRONMENT.title: Environment
ENVIRONMENT.description: Use 'demo' for your paper-trading account, 'live' for the real-money account. Always start with 'demo' and switch to 'live' only after you have verified the data looks right. This tool is read-only either way.

LANGUAGE.title: Prompt language
LANGUAGE.description: Language for slash-prompt instructions to Claude. Currently supports 'en' and 'ru'. Default: en.

SOLANA_ADDRESS.title: Solana wallet address (public)
SOLANA_ADDRESS.description: Your public Solana address (e.g. from Phantom). Public, not a secret. Leave blank to skip Solana.

TON_ADDRESS.title: TON wallet address (public)
TON_ADDRESS.description: Your public TON address (Telegram Wallet → TON Space). Only the non-custodial TON Space is readable; custodial @wallet balances are not. Leave blank to skip TON.

HELIUS_API_KEY.title: Helius API key (free)
HELIUS_API_KEY.description: Free key from helius.dev, required only to read Solana holdings. Stored in your OS keychain.

BYBIT_API_KEY.title: Bybit API key
BYBIT_API_KEY.description: Read-only API key from Bybit (API Management). Enable read access to Account/Wallet only — no Trade, no Withdraw. Mainnet. Leave blank to skip Bybit.

BYBIT_API_SECRET.title: Bybit API secret
BYBIT_API_SECRET.description: Shown once when you create the Bybit API key. Stored in your OS keychain.
